refreshing-cold-coffee-sorbet-comedera.name: Refreshing Cold Coffee Sorbet

ingredients.item: 300 ml very cold filtered coffee (preferably medium-dark toasted)
80 g of sugar (can be replaced with spray panels for a deeper flavour)
1 cdita de extracto de vainilla o vainilla en pasta

instructions: Prepare coffee and let them cool completely with cooling.
Mix cold coffee with sugar, lemon juice, vanilla and pint of salt till sugar dissolve.
Put the mixture into a high plate and freeze it for 45 minutes.
Retira, raspa con un tenedor para romper los cristales y vuelve a congelar.
Repite el proceso de raspado 3 o 4 veces para obtener una textura fina y uniforme.
Bat lightly the purified egg clear to get soft foam and mix with the Sorbet at the last round of scraping.
Fancy another 30 minutes before serving.

refreshing-gin-and-tonic-sorbet-comedera.name: Refreshing Gin And Tonic Sorbet

ingredients.item: 1 cda of freshly squeezed lemon juice
1 cdita de jarabe de glucosa o miel suave

instructions: In a small saucer, add water and sugar. Warm up with medium heat stirring till the sugar completely dissolve.
Add crushed juniper berries, lemon and lime pounding. Let simmer for 2 minutes so that essential oils are integrated.
Retirar del fuego y dejar reposar 10 minutos. Luego colar el jarabe para eliminar las bayas y las ralladuras.
When the syrup's cold, add tonic water, lemon juice and gin. Gently mix so as to avoid losing too much effervescence.
Add a teaspoon of glucose syrup or honey. That helps have a more smooth and less crystallized texture.
Gather into a metal or shallow glass container and bring to the freezer.
Cada 30 minutos, retirar el recipiente y raspar con un tenedor para romper los cristales de hielo. Repetir este proceso durante unas 3 horas.
When the Sorbet has a light and granulated texture similar to fine pomegranate, it will be ready to serve.
Serve in cold cups and decorate with a small peppermint or a thin slice of lime.

refreshing-grape-sorbet-comedera.name: Refreshing Grape Sorbet

ingredients.item: 200 gr de uvas moradas o mixtas, lavadas y despalilladas
50 g of sugar (you can suit your taste)
1 cdita de licor de uva o ron para un toque adulto

instructions: Put grapes, water and sugar in a blender. Processes to get a soft purée.
Cuela la mezcla con un colador fino para eliminar pieles y semillas, asegurando un sorbete sedoso.
Add lemon juice and liquor if you wish. Remix.
Fold production into a freezer-suitable container.
Congela for 3-4 hours, stirring every 30-40 minutes with a fork to break the ice crystals and achieve a smoother texture.
Sirve en copas individuales y decora con hojas de menta fresca o unas uvas enteras.

refreshing-lemon-slushie-comedera.name: Refreshing Lemon Slushie
instructions: Vamos a exprimir los limones, reservando el jugo.
Then you get to scrape a lemon, just the green part. He's trying to avoid his white share as it's very bitter.
Put the juice into your blender or processor, add the lemon frilling with the sugar and mix very well until the sugar is completely dissolved.
Later you will add water and ice and process from time to time until the ice gets nearly polished.
Finish processing and pour your pomegranates into a bowl, cover them well and get them to the refrigerator for 1 hour so that they compact a little more.
Each 25 minutes you'll get him out of the refrigerator and mix him up to avoid his becoming an ice block. We have to make sure that pomegranates are maintained.
After that time, you can serve your pomegranates with individual cups, decorates with peppermint or lemon cuts.
Enjoy!

refreshing-mango-lassi.name: Refreshing Mango Lassi
instructions: Remove the cardamom seeds from the pods and crush into a powder with a mortar and pestle.
In a blender, combine the ice, chopped mangoes or mango pulp, yogurt, milk, and ground cardamom. Blend until smooth. Adjust the sweetness and thickness according to your preference.
Pour the lassi into glasses and garnish with whipped cream and pistachios.
Enjoy!

refreshing-melon-salad.name: Refreshing Melon Salad
instructions: Combine honeydew, galia melon, and watermelon in a bowl. Drizzle with lime zest and juice; toss to coat. Garnish with fresh mint.

refreshing-mint-smoothie-lezzet.name: Refreshing Mint Smoothie
instructions: 1. Take the whole material from the blender to the service cup.

refreshing-non-alcoholic-ginger-beer.name: Refreshing Non-alcoholic Ginger Beer
instructions: Combine 1 1/2 cups plus 2 1/2 tablespoons water, 2 teaspoons sugar, 2 teaspoons ground ginger, and 1 3/4 plus 1/8 teaspoons yeast in a container. Mix together to make the bug. Cover loosely and let stand in a warm place for 24 hours.
'Feed' the bug daily for 7 days by adding 1 teaspoon sugar and 1 teaspoon ground ginger.
Strain the bug through muslin cloth, pouring the liquid into a separate large container.
Mix the strained liquid with 3 quarts cold water. Add lemon juice to the brew.
Dissolve 3 1/4 cups plus 2 1/4 tablespoons sugar in boiling water; add to the brew. Mix in grated ginger. Bottle the ginger beer. Let stand until fizzy, at least 1 week. Refrigerate before drinking.

refreshing-peach-cups.name: Refreshing Peach Cups
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Coat a 12-cup muffin tin with cooking spray.

Roll out pie dough onto a flat, clean surface; cut dough into 12 round circles wider than muffin cup width. Press 1 dough circle into each prepared muffin cup. Cut out round aluminum foil circles; press over dough circles and fill each with 1 tablespoon rice.

Place crusts in the preheated oven; decrease the oven temperature to 204°C (200 degrees C) and bake until crusts set and golden, about 10 minutes. Remove foil and rice. Cool crusts completely, 15 to 25 minutes.

Meanwhile, beat heavy cream, sugar, and vanilla extract together in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment on medium speed until bubbly and frothy. Continue beating until mixture starts to thicken and lines can be seen from whisk, 2 to 3 minutes. Increase mixer speed to medium-high; beat until cream is billowy and doesn't droop when whisk is turned upside down, 30 to 60 seconds. Beat 20 seconds more if not ready, making sure not to over beat or it will curdle. Refrigerate whipped cream until ready to use
Divide whipped cream among baked crusts; top with peaches. Chill in the refrigerator for 5 to 10 minutes.

refreshing-pomegranate-slushie-comedera.name: Refreshing Pomegranate Slushie

ingredients.item: 2 cups of freshly squeezed natural pomegranate juice
2 cdas de miel de agave o miel de abeja (ajustable al gusto)
1 minimum pinch of fine sea salt
A very fine plate of orange (optional and in minimum quantity)

instructions: Expand the juice from fresh pomegranates and cover them to remove seeds or remains of pulp.
Mix pomegranate juice with cold water, honey, lemon juice and pint of salt.
Add a slightly crushed mint and an orange plate if you choose to use it.
Fold the mixture into a large and shallow, preferably metal container.
Lleva al congelador durante 30 minutos.
Retira y raspa con un tenedor para romper los cristales de hielo.
Repite el proceso de raspado cada 30 minutos durante aproximadamente 2 horas, hasta obtener una textura de granizado uniforme.
Retira las hojas de menta antes de servir.
Serves at once in cold vessels.

refreshing-summer-rhubarb-slushy.name: Refreshing Summer Rhubarb Slushy
instructions: Combine rhubarb, 1/4 cup water, and salt in a food processor or blender; blend until rhubarb is finely chopped.
Place a cheesecloth onto a jug and pour the blended rhubarb onto it. Tie the cheesecloth and squeeze all the juice out of the rhubarb. Discard the pulp.
Pour maple syrup into the jug and mix well until all the maple syrup has dissolved.

Squeeze limes into the jug and mix well. Add ice cold water and mix everything together with a large wooden spoon. Taste and adjust sweetness if necessary. Refrigerate rhubarb limeade in the refrigerator until ready to use.
To make slushies: For each serving, place 3/4 cup of rhubarb limeade into the blender with about 1 cup ice; blend until desired consistency.

refreshing-summertime-salad.name: Refreshing Summertime Salad
instructions: Combine baby greens, mango, watermelon, feta cheese, red onion, and mint in a large bowl.
Whisk vinegar, olive oil, and mango juice concentrate together in a small bowl until well combined; drizzle over salad and toss gently until evenly coated.

refreshing-watermelon-dessert-with-choco.name: Refreshing Watermelon Dessert With Chocolate And Almonds
refreshing-watermelon-dessert-with-choco.original_name: Postre refrescante de sandía con chocolate y almendras
instructions: Wash the watershed well, cut it into triangular portions or cubes of the desired size.
Coloca los 100 g de chocolate con leche en un recipiente resistente al calor.
Fairy to bath, constantly stirring to get a smooth and homogenous blend.
It passes every portion of watermelted chocolate and makes sure you cover only a part so that the presentation will be more attractive.
Immediately after cover with chocolate, sprinkle or bounce the covered part with minced almonds.
place the pieces with chocolate and put them onto a waxed paper and refrigerate the watermelon portions covered for 10-15 minutes or until chocolate solidifies. Enjoy!

refried-bean-flautas-recipe-comedera.name: Refried Bean Flautas Recipe
instructions: Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos. Trocea el diente de ajo.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and sock the onion next to the garlic tooth for a few minutes.
Incorpora los frijoles y tritura con la cuchara para que se integre con la cebolla y el ajo.
Sazona con un poco de sal y cocina por unos 4 minutos.
Warm the corn tortillas up an iron and as they are ready, add some of the pilling at the centre and roll up.
Sujeta las flautas con unos palillos por los extremos.
Warm up a frying pan with the vegetable oil and when at temperature, fry the flutes till they are golden.
To serve, come with crisped fresh lettuce, sour cream and fresh cheese. Enjoy!

refried-beans.name: Refried Beans

ingredients.item: Pico de gallo and crumbled queso fresco

instructions: Bring onion, bell pepper, garlic, beans, pork, salt, and 3 quarts water to a boil in a large pot. Reduce heat to medium and cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally and adding boiling water if needed to cover, until beans are tender, 2–2½ hours.

Working in 2 batches, heat ½ cup lard in a large skillet (preferably cast iron) over high. Fry 6 cups beans and their liquid (they will splatter, so be careful) until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 10 minutes. Smash beans in skillet with a potato masher until mixture is thick and no whole beans remain (refried beans should still be pourable at this point, but will thicken as they sit). Transfer to a large bowl. Repeat with remaining beans and ½ cup lard.

Top refried beans with pico de gallo and queso fresco.
Do Ahead: Beans, before frying, can be made 3 months ahead; freeze in an airtight container.


Editor's note: This recipe was originally published in August 2016.

refried-beans-traditional-mexican-recipe.name: Refried Beans (traditional Mexican Recipe)
instructions: Lavamos las alubias pintas y las colocamos en un recipiente con agua suficiente para cubrirlas. Las dejamos en remojo durante al menos 8 horas o durante toda la noche.

We scold the beans and put them into a big pot with fresh water. We cook them with medium heat until they are soft, about 1-2 hours. If you want to make the recipe easier you can use baked boat beans and skip this previous step.
We heat up the oil in a big frying pan with medium-high heat. We added onion and garlic and soften them till they are soft and golden.
We added tomato and cumin and baked and crushed beans to the frying pan. We mix well and we continue to cook with medium heat until the beans are hot and soft, about 10-15 minutes.
We have been trying and adjusting with salt and pepper to our best.

refried-beans-recipe-comedera.name: Refried Beans Recipe

ingredients.item: Aceite vegetal o manteca de cerdo
Chiles*: 2 picantes o no picantes (al gusto.)

instructions: Open the bean bag and separate those that are damaged, or any particles that have been leaked between the grains.
Put the grains into a paddle and wash under a jet of water. Another option is to put a pot of water to heat up, add the beans, leave them a few minutes and then change the water.

Cooking beans with high heat with a couple liters of water. With a pressure pot, leave them a little more than an hour. With a regular pot, two and a half hours. If they're still not soft enough, let them cook some more time.
While cooking the beans, peel the onion and garlic. Cut the first into small cubes and shredded the second.
Lavar el cilantro y el cebollino, y cortar en trozos menudos.
Wash chili or peppers. If it's hot chili, remove the head branch. If it doesn't itch, it can be cut into small pieces.
In another pot, have 4 to 6 tablespoons of oil to fry onion and garlic.
Once the onion begins to be translucent, add whole or minced chilies as necessary.
Add to the mixture the frying beans and just a cup of the stock (or even less if you prefer the thicker beans).
Remueve para que todos los ingredientes se mezclen, y deja cocinar de 8 a 10 minutos. Revisa y mueve los frijoles con cierta frecuencia.
If you added hot chilies to the recipe, this is the time to get them and get them out. If that's not true, everything will stay as they are.
Agregar una cucharadita cafetera de comino, el cilantro y el cebollino picado, y sal y pimienta al gusto. Revolver.
With an umtensil to smash potatoes, step on the beans till they become dough. If your thing's about technology, you can get them through a blender or robot at this point but be sure to get burned.
After the beans have been crushed and have been pitted with cream, try and correct the date if necessary.

refried-black-beans.name: Refried Black Beans
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and jalapeños and cook, stirring, until fragrant. Add beans, cumin, and ½ cup water; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring, and mashing with the back of a wooden spoon, until beans take on a creamy texture, about 3 minutes, adding more water if desired for a creamier consistency.

refrigerator-cake-argiro.name: Refrigerator Cake

ingredients.item: Little fruit of the forest for garnishing
Little fruit of the forest for garnishing

instructions: We grind the cookies.
Melt the butter and mix with the cookies.
We put them in a ring form 25 cm.
Salt the peanut, add the icing and melted butter and mix.
Lay the peanut paste over the cookies.
Freeze the base in the refrigerator for 15′.
Heat the cream and as soon as it starts to swell, pour the chopped couverture.
Allow to stand for 1′ and mix until homogenized.
Add the honey and liqueur.
Allow it to cool a little and empty on the frozen base.
Freeze to tighten the chocolate a bit.
Heat the cream and when it starts to swell, pour the chocolate.
Leave 1′ on the side and mix to melt.
Add the soft cream cheese and mix with wire.
Pour on the chocolate and freeze for 3-4 hours.
Let it stand 15 minutes on the counter before serving.
Garnish with forest fruit.

refrigerator-chocolate-cake-argiro.name: Refrigerator Chocolate Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven first to 160°C in the air.
Butter and flour the cake form 22 cm ring or butter and make non-stick paper in the cake form.
Finely chop the chocolate.
In a pot, add the milk, cream, finely chopped chocolate and in medium heat, mix the ingredients until they melt. Careful, not boil.
In a bowl, add the eggs, flour, sugar, vanilla and salt.
With stirring wire, mix them well and add them to the chocolate milk in the pot.
Mix the ingredients slightly, always in medium heat, until a thick layer is formed on the back of the spoon.
That's to draw a finger to the spoon, and keep the line open.
Pour the mixture into the cake form.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 160°C, in the air, in the middle grill of the oven, for 30 minutes.
Allow it to cool and come to room temperature.
When he comes out of the oven, he loses a little volume, like soufflés.
Refrigerate for one hour.
For the melted chocolate, take off carefully, and put it on a platter.
Always serve it frozen, with ice cream or whipped cream and fruit.

refrigerator-cookie-argiro.name: Refrigerator Cookie

ingredients.item: 250 grating milk 35% beaten in a viscous form
2 tablespoons of soft butter or margarine
250 grating milk 35% beaten in a viscous form
2 tablespoons of soft butter or margarine

instructions: Beat the cold milk cream in a bowl first for 2 minutes with a hand mixer.
Add the peanut butter.
Allow the cream to stand for 5′ and add the whipped cream in thick form.
Gently fold the mixture.
In a square baking pan, set a row of pots to cover the entire base of the baking pan.
Spread half the cream on a layer.
Cover with a layer of banana slices.
We're doing another layer of cookies.
Spread the rest of the cream and the remaining bananas.
Finally, cover with a layer of potty ber and spread all the chocolate coating.
Freeze for 4-5 hours or one night.

refrigerator-cookies.name: Refrigerator Cookies
instructions: Line a baking sheet with waxed paper.

Combine sugar, milk, and butter in a saucepan. Bring to a boil; simmer until sugar is dissolved, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in chocolate chips, oats, coconut, and walnuts. Drop spoonfuls of mixture 1 inch apart on the lined baking sheet.
Chill until firm, about 1 hour.

refrigerator-dessert-with-3-cream-layers.name: Refrigerator Dessert With 3 Cream Layers And Cookies
refrigerator-dessert-with-3-cream-layers.original_name: Γλυκό ψυγείου με 3 κρεμένιες στρώσεις και μπισκότα

ingredients.item: 200 grsocolata white or other flavours (caramella or praline or orange)
A little liquor of your liking
200 grsocolata white or other flavours (caramella or praline or orange)
A little liquor of your liking

instructions: For the refrigerator cake with 3 creamy layers and stuffed biscuits, keep 2 cups of cold milk and dissolve the corn flour.
Place the rest of the milk in a pot along with the sugar and the vanillas.
Let it warm up.
Add the dissolved cornflaur and stir continuously in medium heat to thicken the cream.
Divide the cream into three bowls. In each bowl, add 1 type of chocolate.
Mix to melt the chocolates.
Pour the cognac into the cold milk.
We dip cookies in it and coat them in a long or square fireproof vessel. It'll get thinner in a long way, but more pieces will come out.
We make a layer of white chocolate cream, add a layer of grated biscuits or dipped in milk biscuits.
We coat the chocolate cream on top. If we want to make a layer grated or whole dipped in biscuit milk and finally make the third cream.
Allow it to come to room temperature.
Freeze for 1-2 hours and serve with grated biscuit.
If you do not find orange chocolate, add white chocolate and orange zest to the cream. It won't come out in color, but it'll taste like orange.

refrigerator-dessert-with-chocolate-argi.name: Refrigerator Dessert With Chocolate
instructions: We sift the flour and cocoa.
Add the butter, sugar, salt, vanillas, eggs and cocoa.
With a hand mixer, beat 2 minutes at low speed.
Finely chop the chocolate with a knife, add it and mix with spatula.
We use a fireproof square vessel.
We butter it well.
Pour the chocolate into the baking pan for the sweet refrigerator with chocolate.
Preheat the oven in the air at 200°C and bake for 15 to 20 minutes to make a light crust. Inside his heart will be wet.
Once removed from the oven, pierce the surface with a knife and sprinkle with the cream liqueur.
Let it cool completely so that the chocolate thickens.

refrigerator-dessert-with-cookies-argiro.name: Refrigerator Dessert With Cookies
instructions: Beat the herbal cream with hand mixer for a few minutes until soft peaks are formed.
Add the praline and beat at low speed for 1 minute until the cream is homogenized.
Pour the liqueur into the milk and mix.
Break cookies into thick pieces.
In a 30×25 or nearby baking pan, we make one layer of broken cookies.
We sprinkle them with half the chocolate milk.
Spread half the cream.
Repeat layer with the remaining broken biscuits and pour them with the rest of the milk.
We make a layer of the rest of the cream.
Sprinkle the surface with hazelnuts mixed with chocolate zest.
Freeze for 4 to 5 hours or even better for one night.
We serve and enjoy.

refrigerator-dessert-with-petit-ber-argi.name: Refrigerator Dessert With Petit Ber

ingredients.item: 8 tablespoons full vanilla maize blossom (or cornflower)
8 tablespoons full vanilla maize blossom (or cornflower)

instructions: Keep 1/2 liters of milk separate and dissolve the corn flour.
Place the remaining milk in a pot with the sugar to heat.
Then pour the cold milk with the cornflower into the pot with the hot milk.
Mix on medium heat until the cream thickens.
After it thickens, add the butter and mix to melt.
Divide it into two bowls while still warm.
Add the chocolate praline grated and mix well.
In the other half, mix the white chocolate.
[adrotate banner=”33′′]
Mix the creams with spatula while warm to melt the chocolates.
In bowls, crush into thick pieces the pitty ber cookies and add the wafers.
Sprinkle them with liquor and mix them.
Add half the biscuits to the chocolate cream and mix to dress.
Pour them into a pyre in a layer.
Add the remaining cookies to the white chocolate cream and mix to dress.
Pour them into a layer on the chocolate cream.
Freeze until it cools completely.
Serve with finely ground wafers and truffles.
Read here the nicest fridge candy.

refrigerator-dill-pickles.name: Refrigerator Dill Pickles
instructions: Stir water, vinegar, sugar, and sea salt together in a saucepan over high heat; bring to a boil. Remove from the heat and cool completely.
Combine cucumber spears, garlic cloves, and fresh dill in a large glass or plastic lidded container.
Pour cooled vinegar mixture over cucumbers, garlic, and dill.
Seal container with lid and refrigerate for at least 3 days.

refrigerator-garlic-dill-spears.name: Refrigerator Garlic Dill Spears
instructions: Divide garlic, dill, and peppercorns between 2 sterilized quart-size glass jars with lids. Wash cucumbers; trim and discard blossom ends. Cut each cucumber into 6 to 8 spears; pack vertically and snugly into jars.
Combine vinegar, water, and salt in a medium saucepan over high heat; bring brine to a boil, stirring until salt dissolves.

Divide brine between jars to cover spears, filling to within ½ inch from the top. Gently tap jars to remove any air bubbles. Add more brine if necessary until reaches ½ inch from the top. Wipe the rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue.
Cool completely, about 1 hour. Cover jars with lids. Refrigerate at least 48 hours (flavor improves with time). Store in refrigerator up to 1 month.

refrigerator-oatmeal-cups.name: Refrigerator Oatmeal Cups
instructions: Stir oats, half-and-half, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt together in an air-tight container until blended. Seal container and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
Pour contents of container into prepared oatmeal; stir. Slice a banana and add to oatmeal.

refrigerator-rainbow-carrot-pickles.name: Refrigerator Rainbow Carrot Pickles
instructions: Scrub carrots thoroughly (do not peel), rinse well, and drain. Using a mandoline or food processor, slice into 1/8-inch-thick rounds, discarding tops. Transfer to a colander set over a bowl. Toss with sugar and 1 teaspoon salt. Let stand 1 hour, then rinse under cold water; drain.

Toast cloves or coriander seeds in a nonreactive 3-quart pot over medium heat, shaking pan, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Carefully pour in water. Stir in vinegar, honey, and remaining 3 teaspoons salt. Bring to a boil; add carrots and cook, stirring, just until brine returns to a simmer, about 8 minutes.

Spoon carrots into 2 clean quart jars, using a slotted spoon, and pack them in snugly. Carefully pour or ladle enough brine over veggies to cover completely, leaving about 1/2 inch headspace. Wipe rims with a damp paper towel. Let cool to room temperature, about 1 hour.
Apply clean lids. Chill at least 24 hours before eating for best flavor. (Flavor improves with time.) Store in fridge up to 1 month.

refrigerator-sweet-argiro.name: Refrigerator Sweet
instructions: Keep 1 cup of milk aside. Place the rest in a pot along with the sugar.
Add the vanilla stick along and scrape the seeds with the blade of a knife.
Pour the seeds into the milk.
Heat the milk over medium heat. Add a pinch of salt.
In the cold milk we kept, we dissolve the cornflare by mixing well until there are no lumps.
Add the dissolved cornflaur to the pot with hot milk, stirring continuously with wire or wooden spoon.
Cook until the cream thickens.
Once the cream binds and becomes velvety texture, withdraw from the fire.

refrigerator-sweet-with-jelly-argiro.name: Refrigerator Sweet With Jelly

ingredients.item: 250 ml milk cream 36% fat (stuck in thick form)
2 petti ber biscuits (or stuffed strawberry biscuits)
250 ml milk cream 36% fat (stuck in thick form)
2 petti ber biscuits (or stuffed strawberry biscuits)

instructions: In a bowl, add the yogurt, cream cheese and powder.
Mix with a spatula.
Add the whipped cream and gently mix.
We're setting up a big ring or pyrex.
We make layers of cream, cookies, finishing with cream.
You can alternatively break cookies into thick pieces and mix them with the cream.
Heat the strawberry jam for a while in a pot to dilute its texture.
Alternatively on the coating you can put strawberry jelly.
After it cools a little, we put it on its surface.
Garnish with strawberries whole or sliced.
Freeze for 3-4 hours to stabilize.

refrigerator-sweet-with-stevia-argiro.name: Refrigerator Sweet With Stevia

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of vanilla or two capsules
250 grbiscuit free of sugar for baking
2 tablespoons of vanilla or two capsules
250 grbiscuit free of sugar for baking

instructions: We can use animal milk but also vegetable almond or oats milk.
We make the vanilla cream first.
In a large pot, add the milk, corn flour, salt, liquid sweetener with stevia and vanilla.
Mix all the ingredients with wire to dissolve the cornflare completely before putting the cream on fire.
Add the pot over low heat and stir until the cream boils.
Add half the vanilla cream to a bowl and add the chopped chocolate.
Mix with a soft spatula to completely melt the chocolate.
In a 30 x 25 million baking pan we make a layer of cookies.
Cover with the chocolate cream on a layer.
Repeat a layer of cookies and cover with vanilla cream.
Allow the sweet to come to room temperature.

And so far, the dessert is ready, and after it freezes for two hours, let's serve it. But with the fresh strawberry jelly as the last layer it becomes impressive with the red strawberry layer and has all its flavor and freshness.

reggo-salad-or-the-alternative-taramo-sa.name: Reggo Salad Or The Alternative Taramo Salad – Ouzo Mezedes

ingredients.item: Herring eggs of two egged herrings
1 lemon juicy maybe a little more
3 brown bread preferably prezymene or crimson nut
6 Hearts of artichokes in oil or frozen
2 tablespoons of mayonese or fresh cream cheese
Herring eggs of two egged herrings
1 lemon juicy maybe a little more
3 brown bread preferably prezymene or crimson nut
6 Hearts of artichokes in oil or frozen
2 tablespoons of mayonese or fresh cream cheese

instructions: Those who love traditional taramosalata then when you try the recipe regosalata, you will become faithful fans of it.

In essence it is an alternative taramosalata with unforgettable taste long aftertaste and unique texture. Its texture defines the herring eggs. As a miniature caviar, these very small spherical herring eggs actually leave their flavor and playful texture inside the regosalata.
All you have to remember when you make it, is to buy female herrings egged since the herring eggs are the basic raw material for authentic regosalata.
You usually recognize a herring egged from the inflatable like a balloon shape that has the belly of the paste herring. The bag of herring eggs hidden in the belly of the fish is the magic secret.

Don't put meat from pedestal herring, on the one hand, because you will lose all its delicate flavor and on the other hand, the pedestal herring has a heavy smell and dark color. Her flesh will cover and prevail within the salad and the result is not pleasant.
Enjoy it just as we make it on my island Paros and you will remember me.

reginetti-with-savoy-cabbage-and-pancett.name: Reginetti With Savoy Cabbage And Pancetta
instructions: Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente (pasta will still be opaque and very firm in the center). Drain pasta, reserving 1½ cups pasta cooking liquid.
Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet over medium and cook pancetta, turning halfway through, until brown and crisp, about 4 minutes. Drain on paper towels.

Add cabbage to skillet and cook undisturbed until deeply browned in some spots, about 3 minutes. Toss, then cook undisturbed until deeply browned in other spots, about 2 minutes. Continue to cook and toss until cabbage is charred in some spots and bright green in others and beginning to wilt. Add butter and thyme and cook, tossing, until butter begins to brown, about 2 minutes. Add Parmesan, pasta, and 1 cup pasta cooking liquid and cook, tossing often and adding more cooking liquid to help finish cooking pasta, until pasta is al dente and sauce is thickened and emulsified and coats pasta, about 5 minutes. Add pancetta and toss to combine; taste and season with salt and pepper. Serve topped with poppy seeds.

reheated-turkey-cakes-recipe-comedera.name: Reheated Turkey Cakes: Recipe
reheated-turkey-cakes-recipe-comedera.original_name: Tortas de pavo recalentado: receta fácil

ingredients.item: ½ cup of finely minced bacon
4  rebanadas del queso de tu preferencia

instructions: Start your recipe and add to a frying pan the finely cut bacon and leap with medium heat till golden.
Ahora, agrega el pavo deshebrado o cortado de la forma de tu preferencia y saltea junto al tocino por 5 minutos aproximadamente.
Procede  y rebana tu pan en dos, procurando que queden iguales las mitades.
Unta cada rebanada de pan con mayonesa y luego esparce los frijoles refritos.
Incorporate the turkey with the bacon, as much as you prefer.
Agrega las rebanadas de queso al pan.
Finally, add lettuce, avocado cuts and tomato cuts to suit them.
He cuts half and likes with jalapeno.
Enjoy!

reheated-turkey-wrap-with-cheese-step-by.name: Reheated Turkey Wrap With Cheese Step By Step
reheated-turkey-wrap-with-cheese-step-by.original_name: Wrap de pavo recalentado con queso paso a paso

ingredients.item: 200 grs.  de sobras del pavo desmenuzado
¼ of onion (minced into small cubes)
1  chile chipotle en adobo ( cortado finamente)

instructions: In a frying pan with medium heat, melt the butter and add onion and garlic.
Cocina por 2 minutos sin dejar que se queme y luego agrega la crema de leche y el chipotle.
Cooking for another 1 minute.
Add turkey to frying pan, stir well and let cook for 4-5 minutes so that all flavors are integrated.
Calienta la tortilla sobre una plancha.
To set up the wrap on the omelette first add the spinach, then the turkey.
He scatters well throughout the centre of the omelette and finally adds pits of avocado and tomato.
Add the grated or sliced cheese.
Cierra el wrap y disfruta.

reindeer-food.name: Reindeer Food
instructions: Cover a large area of counter space with waxed paper and tape it down.
Mix pretzels, corn cereal, peanuts, and candy-coated milk chocolate pieces together in a large bowl.
Melt white chocolate in the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring frequently and scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching.
Pour melted white chocolate over pretzel mixture; stir to evenly coat.
Quickly transfer mixture to the prepared waxed paper and spread in a thin layer; let cool completely, at least 30 minutes.
Break into pieces and store in an airtight container.

reindeer-poop.name: Reindeer Poop
instructions: Place the white candy coating, German sweet chocolate, chocolate chips, and peanuts into a slow cooker.
Set the cooker to Low, cover, and gently heat the candy for 1 1/2 hours without stirring.
After 1 1/2 hours, stir the mixture, and spoon out by teaspoons onto waxed paper.
Allow to cool and set, about 45 minutes.

reindeer-shaped-christmas-brownies-peque.name: Reindeer-shaped Christmas Brownies
reindeer-shaped-christmas-brownies-peque.original_name: Brownies navideños en forma de reno

ingredients.item: Grageas de chocolate rojas para la nariz (lacasitos, m&ms, smarties..), p.ej. estos
Molde cuadrado de aprox. 20x20cm, p.ej. este

instructions: We purify the oven at 180 been 3 been (heat up and down). We melt chocolate and butter into the bathroom or at short intervals in the microwave, constantly stirring up and get a smooth and bright blend.
We cut a square mold of about 20 × 20 cm (e.g. this) with vegetable paper and let it stand out a little from the sides and this will make it easier to unmold the brownie once baked.
We divide the yolks from the clear and leave the clear apart to use them later. In a large bowl we beat the yolks with the sugar until we get a creamy blend.
We have been pounding the flour and salt and we have been integrating them into the mixture of yolks and sugar, and they have been moved softly.
Incorporamos el chocolate derretido con movimientos suaves.
Batimos las claras a punto de nieve y las incorporamos con cuidado a la mezcla para que no pierdan aire.
Incorporamos las nueces picadas y las distribuimos de manera uniforme.
Let's put the dough into the forage mold, levelling the surface with a spatula.
We bake at 180 ¬ 3 ″ for about 20-25 minutes, till the centre is still a little moist: while inserting a stick, some crumbs have to be stayed but no liquid mass.
Once baked, we let the brownies cold into the mold for about 10-15 minutes before they are tipped with outstanding paper edges. That helps them to keep their shape and make them easier to cut.

We cut the brownie into squares about 4-5 cm from the side so that every square will be an individual reindeer. With these measures are usually about 12-16 brownies, depending on the size of the mold.
We mix the sugar with a few drops of milk and get a thick frying that will serve as an edible "glue." We put two pretzels as banners at every brownie.
We place our sugar eyes using some frying to hold them.
Colocamos un Lacasito o M&Ms rojo en el centro como nariz.
And ready! Each brownie's now a friendly reindeer Rudolph.

reine-de-saba.name: Reine De Saba
instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 177°C. Butter and flour 8-inch-diameter cake pan with 2-inch-high sides. Combine chopped chocolate and rum in medium metal bowl. Set bowl over medium saucepan of barely simmering water. Stir until chocolate is melted and smooth. Remove bowl from over water. Cool melted chocolate, stirring occasionally.
Using electric mixer, beat butter and 2/3 cup sugar in large bowl until fluffy and pale. Add egg yolks and beat until blended.
Using clean dry beaters, beat egg whites and pinch of salt in medium bowl until soft peaks form. Add 1 tablespoon sugar and beat until stiff but not dry.

Fold chocolate mixture, then almonds and almond extract into yolk mixture. Fold in 1/4 of whites to lighten batter. Fold in 1/3 of remaining whites. Sift 1/3 of flour over and fold in. Fold in remaining whites alternately with flour in 2 more additions each. Transfer batter to prepared pan. Push some batter 3/4 inch up sides of pan with rubber spatula (batter will slip down).

Bake cake until puffed and gently set in center and tester inserted into center comes out with a few moist crumbs attached, about 25 minutes. Cool cake in pan 10 minutes. Cut around pan sides and carefully turn cake out onto rack. Cool completely, about 2 hours.

Combine chocolate and rum in small metal bowl. Set bowl over small saucepan of barely simmering water and stir until melted and smooth. Remove bowl from over water. Using wooden spoon, beat in butter, 1 tablespoon at a time, until icing is smooth. Place bowl over medium bowl filled with ice water. Continue to beat until icing is cool and thickened to spreading consistency.

Place cake on platter. Scrape icing onto top center. Using small offset spatula, spread icing evenly and thinly over top and sides of cake. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover with cake dome and store at room temperature.
A Port-style wine from the south of France would be delicious with the cake. Try the Cornet & Cie 2006 Banyuls Rimage ($16 for 500 ml), which has hints of chocolate and cherry.
Slightly pushing the cake batter up the sides of the pan before baking (even though the batter will slip down again) can help ensure that the cake will stay level and bake more evenly.

reisfladen-rice-pudding-cake.name: Reisfladen (rice Pudding Cake)
instructions: Combine 1/2 gallon milk, rice, and sugar in a slow cooker. Cook on High until rice is puffy but mixture is still thin, about 3 hours 15 minutes.

Mix 3 eggs, 1/4 cup milk, vanilla extract, and salt together in a bowl. Add 1/2 cup of the hot rice mixture, stirring in 1 tablespoon at a time, until blended. Pour mixture into the slow cooker, stirring constantly. Cook on Low until rice has absorbed all the liquid, about 30 minutes more. Let cool to room temperature, about 2 hours.

Meanwhile, place flour, yeast, sugars, egg, lukewarm milk, and melted butter in a bread machine in the order listed. Run Dough cycle. Remove dough from the machine after the cycle is done, about 90 minutes. Let rise in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Butter an 11-inch springform pan. Smooth dough into the pan.
Whisk 2 eggs and brush all but 1 tablespoon onto the dough. Pour rice pudding onto the dough and brush top with remaining egg wash.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the cake layer comes out clean, about 25 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes and release cake from the pan. Let cool completely. Refrigerate until thoroughly chilled, 6 hours to overnight.

relajo.name: Relajo

ingredients.item: . cacao nibs or  0.25 cup (scant) unsweetened dark cocoa powder

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Scatter chiles, star anise, cinnamon sticks, bay leaves, coriander seeds, oregano, pumpkin seeds, sesame seeds, cacao nibs, cumin seeds, and achiote seeds on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet and bake until lightly browned and chiles are crisp, 18–22 minutes. Let cool.
Transfer chile mixture to a blender and blend on high until finely ground, about 1 minute (be careful not to overprocess; you don’t want it to turn into a paste).
Do ahead: Relajo can be made 1 month ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

relish-tray-with-diy-eggs.name: Relish Tray With D.i.y. Eggs

ingredients.prep: scallions, celery, peeled carrots, and/or peeled beets)

instructions: Divide dill, coriander seeds, and fennel seeds evenly among six 8-oz. resealable plastic containers, jars, or small bowls. Place chiles, fennel, scallions, celery, carrots, and/or beets individually in a container, followed by a generous pinch of kosher salt. Whisk vinegar, agave, and ½ cup water in a measuring glass; pour over vegetables. Cover and chill at least 12 hours and up to 2 days.
Whisk mayonnaise, mustard, lemon juice, turmeric, and cayenne in a small bowl; season sauce with kosher salt.
Cook eggs in a large saucepan of boiling salted water 8 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water; let cool. Peel eggs under running water; halve lengthwise.

Place pickled vegetables individually in small serving bowls. Place olives, almonds, and some sea salt each in a small bowl. Place eggs on a platter and serve with sauce, pickles, olives, almonds, and sea salt. Let guests assemble eggs as desired.

remoulade-sauce-remoulade-sauce-argiro.name: Remoulade Sauce – Remoulade Sauce
instructions: Finely chop the cucumber into small cubes.
We mow garlic.
Place the mayonnaise in a bowl.
Add all other ingredients (tour, garlic, spices, mustard, etc.) to mayonnaise.
Mix well with a wire until the materials are homogenized.
If you want more fluid sauce, add a few drops of water and mix again until we reach the desired composition.
Cover the bowl and place the sauce in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to cool and highlight the aromas.

renees-strawberry-rhubarb-pie.name: Renee's Strawberry Rhubarb Pie
instructions: Whisk cornstarch and 1 tablespoon water together in a large bowl until combined; stir in rhubarb, strawberries, white sugar, vanilla extract, cinnamon, and lemon juice. Set filling aside for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Roll out half dough on a floured surface to fit a 9-inch pie plate; place in pie plate and refrigerate until ready to use. Roll top crust on a floured surface into a 10-inch circle. Cut into 1-inch wide strips with a sharp paring knife or pastry wheel; set aside.

Stir filling; pour into the prepared pie plate. Moisten the rim of the crust with a small amount of water. Start with the longest dough strips and lay the first 2 in an X in the center of the pie. Alternate horizontal and vertical strips, weaving them in an over-and-under pattern. Use the shortest strips for the edges of the lattice. Press strips down on crust rim to seal; trim excess. Beat egg white and 1 teaspoon water together in a small bowl; brush over lattice top. Sprinkle with turbinado sugar. Wrap aluminum foil strips around edges of pie.

Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C); bake until crust is golden and filling is bubbling, 40 to 45 more minutes. Remove aluminum foil for the last 10 minutes of baking time. Cool pie completely before serving.

republic-of-the-rio-grande-grilled-tuna-.name: Republic Of The Rio Grande Grilled Tuna And Grapefruit Supreme Salad
instructions: Peel and segment 2 grapefruits; set aside. Squeeze the juice from the other half grapefruit into a measuring cup; it should yield about 1/4 cup of juice.

To make the salad dressing, combine the grapefruit juice, vinegar, oil, garlic, salt, freshly ground black pepper to taste, and minced jalapeño in a medium bowl; mix well. Cover and refrigerate the salad dressing.

Place the tuna steaks in a shallow dish. Pour 1 tablespoon of dressing over each piece of tuna. Turn the tuna in the marinade to coat. Cover with plastic wrap, or place all of the tuna steaks and marinade in a plastic bag, and refrigerate for 1 hour.

Light the grill. Remove the tuna from the refrigerator and allow to come to room temperature. Grill for about 4 minutes per inch of thickness for rare, 6 minutes for medium or until done to taste, turning at least once.

To serve, toss the greens with the salad dressing in a mixing bowl. Divide the dressed greens among 4 plates. Top each with a grilled tuna steak, then sprinkle with freshly ground black pepper. Spread grapefruit supremes over the top of the salad. Garnish with the cilantro and red onion slices.

reshteh-polo-persian-noodle-rice.name: Reshteh Polo (persian Noodle Rice)
instructions: Place rice in a medium bowl and cover with tepid water. Gently swish it around with your finger to activate the starches, then tip the bowl to drain water. Repeat this process until water runs clear, about 7 rinses. Cover rice with cold water, add 1/2 tablespoon salt, stir gently, and soak for 1 hour. Drain rice without rinsing.
Crush saffron threads to a powder in a small mortar and pestle. Transfer to a small bowl with 2 tablespoons boiling water. Stir, cover, and set saffron water aside.

Fill a 5-quart nonstick pot with 9 cups water and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Add 3 tablespoons salt and stir until dissolved. Break roasted noodles into thirds and add to boiling water with rice. Stir once gently, and watch carefully as it cooks so water does not boil over. Taste water for salt and adjust accordingly. Cook until first rice grain pops up to the surface. Set a timer for 4 minutes and cook, scooping off any foam from the surface until the timer goes off. Test rice and continue to cook until tender on the outside but still firm to the bite on the inside, 6 to 8 minutes more.

Drain rice and noodles in a colander and rinse quickly with lukewarm water and a spray faucet to rinse off extra starch. Taste and gently rinse again if too salty. Set aside to drain completely. Wash and dry the pot.

Place the clean pot over medium heat. Add oil, 1 tablespoon saffron water, and a pinch of salt; swirl the pot until the bottom and lower sides are coated with the oil mixture. Tightly overlap potato slices in a single layer covering the bottom of the pot to create the tahdig layer.

Gently scatter rice-noodle mixture over the tahdig in a pyramid shape, making sure potatoes are completely covered and moving noodles away from the sides of the pot. Gently poke the handle of a wooden spoon into rice and noodles a few times, being careful not to hit tahdig; this will allow steam to escape while cooking. Cover and cook until you see steam escaping from the sides of the lid and tahdig starts to set, about 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine 1/4 cup boiling water with 2 tablespoons melted butter and remaining saffron water. Lay a kitchen towel out on a heatproof surface.

Test tahdig by quickly tapping the side of the pot with a wooden spoon. When the pot sizzles, remove it from the heat. Remove the lid and place it on the kitchen towel, being careful that none of the condensation drips into the pot. Wrap the towel around the lid and secure the ends at the top by the handle so they will not hang near the heat source. Drizzle butter mixture over rice and cover with the towel-wrapped lid.

Place a heat diffuser on a burner over low or medium-low heat and return the pot to the stove. Cook until crispy, rotating the pot a few times, about 35 minutes. Remove from the heat and place on a damp kitchen towel; let sit, uncovered, for 5 minutes so tahdig will release easily.
Meanwhile, melt 3 tablespoons butter in a small pan over medium heat. Add dates, raisins, and cinnamon; sprinkle with a little salt. Cook and stir until dates are glistening and soft, 3 to 5 minutes.
Gently scatter rice on a platter and remove potato tahdig pieces and serve on the side. Sprinkle raisin-date sauce over top.

restaurant-style-meat-and-potato-dish-re.original_name: Lokanta Usulü Etli Patates Yemeği Tarifi

ingredients.item: 500 g bird dana or lamb meat
3 tablespoon liquid oil or olive oil
2-3 water cups hot water or meat suy  u
You can use lamb meat instead of the bird; the lamb becomes more aromatic.
If you want to pee faster, chicken gökü or can also be preferred.

You can try sweet potatoes instead of classic potatoes, add a light sweet flavor to the dish.
Küp chopped havu&ccedil instead of chopped potatoes; or pumpkin can also be used.
Onion can be used in pırasa or arpacık onions instead.

2. Add onions and roast until pink.
3. Add yellowms and roast for 1 minute.
4. Havuç add potatoes, pumpkin, pepper, green beans and peas to the pot.
5. roast in medium fire up to 5 minutes.
6. Add and mix grated tomatoes to the car.
7. Add chicken or vegetable water, add salt, pepper and optional red powder pepper.
8. Ç Leave the cake to boil, then cook about 25-30 minutes until the golden jealousy and vegetables soften.

restaurant-style-buffalo-chicken-wings.name: Restaurant-style Buffalo Chicken Wings
instructions: Whisk together flour, paprika, cayenne pepper, and salt in a large bowl.

Place chicken wings in the bowl with flour mixture and toss until evenly coated. Transfer wings to a 9x13-inch glass baking dish and arrange in a single layer. Cover and refrigerate for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
Add about 1 inch oil to a deep, heavy skillet; heat to 191°C (190 degrees C). (The oil should be just enough to cover wings entirely.)

Meanwhile, combine butter, hot sauce, pepper, and garlic powder in a separate small saucepan over low heat. Cook and stir until butter is melted and mixture is thoroughly blended. Remove from the heat and reserve for serving.

Fry coated wings in the hot oil for 10 to 15 minutes, or until they begin to crisp and turn brown. Maintain the oil temperature while cooking. Remove cooked wings from hot oil and let drain on paper towels or a wire rack.
Transfer wings to a platter and drizzle hot sauce over top; or mix wings and hot sauce in a bowl until coated.

restaurant-style-french-onion-soup.name: Restaurant-style French Onion Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a large stockpot over medium heat. Cook and stir onions, garlic, thyme, salt, and pepper in hot butter until onions are soft and brown, about 30 minutes.
Pour in red wine and sherry; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer until you can no longer smell alcohol cooking off, about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Sprinkle onion mixture with flour and stir until coated; cook for 10 minutes. Pour in broth, stir to blend in flour, and simmer until slightly thickened, about 20 minutes.

While soup is simmering, arrange baguette slices on a baking sheet and drizzle with olive oil. Bake baguette slices in the preheated oven until golden brown, 12 to 14 minutes, flipping slices halfway through baking. Set aside.
Set an oven rack about 8 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.

Ladle soup into 6 oven-proof crocks, filling them about 3/4 full. Place 1 or 2 toasted baguette slices over each soup serving, then top each with a Swiss cheese and provolone slice. Carefully place filled crocks onto a sturdy baking sheet.
Cook soup under the preheated broiler until cheese is browned and bubbly, 3 to 4 minutes.

restaurant-style-fries.name: Restaurant-style Fries
instructions: Peel the potatoes. Using a chef's knife or a mandoline, slice the potatoes lengthwise into ¼-inch-thick planks, then cut those into ¼-inch-thick matchsticks.
In a large bowl, combine the 3 cups water, ice, and 2 teaspoons of the salt. Add the potatoes, and let soak for 15 minutes. Drain and rinse well.

Transfer the potatoes to a pot, and add enough water to cover them. Stir in the vinegar and remaining 1 teaspoon salt. Heat over high heat until the mixture comes to a boil, about 8 minutes, or until the potatoes are fork-tender but still slightly firm in the center. Drain and set aside on a wire rack to cool at room temperature until completely cooled, about 30 minutes.

In a cast-iron pot, heat the oil over high heat to 166°C (165°C). Working in 4 batches, to avoid overcrowding, cook the potatoes in the hot oil for about 3 minutes, until light golden. Using a wire spider, remove the potatoes to a wire rack. Reserve the oil in the pot, and set it aside.
Freeze the fried potatoes (still on the wire rack) until frozen solid, for at least 4 hours.
Over high heat, heat the reserved oil in the pot to 191°C (190°C). Fry the potatoes in 4 batches until golden and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Drain the fries on a wire rack. Sprinkle with salt to taste.
Enjoy!

restaurant-style-shoyu-miso-ramen.name: Restaurant-style Shoyu Miso Ramen

ingredients.item: Naruto (fish paste stick with a red spiral pattern). sliced

instructions: Preheat the oven to 135°C (135 degrees C).
Place black fungus in a large bowl; fill with water.
Combine mirin, 1/2 cup soy sauce, onion, 1/2 cup brown sugar, 3 chopped green onion bulbs, and garlic in an oven-safe pot over high heat; bring to a boil.
Place pork belly skin-side down on a flat work surface. Roll up lengthwise; secure with twine. Place pork belly into mirin mixture; partially cover pot with lid.
Bake in the preheated oven until pork is tender and an instant-read thermometer inserted into center reads at least 63°C (63 degrees C), about 4 hours.

Fill a bowl with ice and cold water; set aside. Meanwhile, bring a separate pot of water to a boil over high heat; gently add eggs and cook until yolks are barely set, 8 to 10 minutes. Transfer eggs to the bowl of ice water; let sit about 1 minute. Remove eggs from water; peel.

Place eggs in a container with 1 cup water, 1/2 cup soy sauce, and 2 tablespoons brown sugar. Dampen a paper towel in soy sauce mixture; cover container with dampened paper towel. Refrigerate 4 hours to overnight.
Drain black fungus; add to liquid in pork belly pot. Cover pot with a lid; refrigerate 4 hours to overnight.
Skim fungus from top of pork belly mixture; place in a pot with 8 cups water. Fungus should be covered in pork belly fat. Add remaining 1/4 cup soy sauce and miso paste; bring to a boil.
Remove and discard skin from pork belly using a knife. Chop meat into pieces of desired thickness. Cut eggs in half lengthwise.
Bring a separate pot of water to a boil. Add ramen and cook until noodles are tender yet firm to the bite, stirring occasionally, about 3 minutes. Drain.

Place 4 nori slices diagonally in corner of each bowl. Place noodles on top; arrange 2 egg halves and a few pork belly slices separately. Cover with black fungus, top with remaining 3 chopped green onion bulbs, and pour in broth. Top each bowl with a few slices of naruto. Let sit before serving, about 3 minutes.

restaurant-style-supreme-pizza.name: Restaurant-style Supreme Pizza
instructions: Make the dough: Place the flour, water, oil, salt, sugar, and yeast in a large bowl. Stir together or mix using your hands until a rough dough forms (no kneading needed). Cover the bowl tightly, and let the dough rest at room temperature for 12–24 hours, until bubbly and expanded.

Place the dough on a floured work surface. Divide the dough evenly into 2 portions, and shape each into a tight ball. Place the dough balls on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray. Cover the dough loosely with plastic wrap, and let it rise at room temperature until doubled in size, 1–1½ hours.

Meanwhile, make the sauce: Place the drained tomatoes, oil, salt, and garlic in a large bowl or tall container. Process the mixture using an immersion blender until smooth and slightly thickened, 1–2 minutes. (Alternatively, process the mixture in a regular blender.) Set aside at room temperature. Preheat the oven to 260°C (260°C).

Make the cooked toppings: Heat 1 tablespoon of the oil in a skillet over medium. Add the sausage, and cook, breaking it apart with a spoon, until browned and fully cooked, 4–5 minutes. Transfer the sausage to a bowl, and set aside at room temperature until ready to use. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the skillet. Add the mushrooms, and cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until golden and slightly crisped around the edges, 3–4 minutes. Lightly season with salt, and remove from heat. Transfer the mushrooms to a bowl, and set aside at room temperature until ready to use.
Place a 10-inch cast-iron skillet in the preheated oven. Let the skillet heat for about 15 minutes, or until very hot.

Lightly dust a work surface with semolina flour. Remove 1 dough ball from the bowl, and place it on the work surface (keep the other dough ball in the covered bowl). Press around the dough edges to form a ¼-inch crust, then gently stretch and shape into a 9-inch round.

Carefully remove the hot skillet from the oven, and drizzle in 1 tablespoon of the oil, swirling to coat. Gently lay the dough round in the skillet. Quickly spread about ¼ cup of the prepared sauce over the surface. Top with ½ cup of the mozzarella cheese, 2 tablespoons of the bell pepper, 2 tablespoons of the onion, half of the cooked sausage, half of the cooked mushrooms, and ½ tablespoon of the Parmesan.

Place the skillet in the hot oven, and bake the pizza for 8–10 minutes, until the crust is golden brown, the toppings are hot and bubbly, and the cheese is fully melted. Carefully remove the skillet from the oven, transfer the pizza to a cutting board. Let cool for 1–2 minutes, then slice.

Wipe out the skillet with a paper towel to remove any excess residue, then return it to the oven to reheat for 5–10 minutes. Once hot, add the remaining 1 tablespoon oil, and swirl to coat. Repeat Steps 6 through 8 with the remaining dough, sauce, cheese, and toppings. Bake for 8–10 minutes, until the crust is deep golden and the cheese is melted and bubbling. Slice and serve.
Enjoy!

restaurant-style-sweet-potato-casserole.name: Restaurant-style Sweet Potato Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Rub sweet potato skins with vegetable oil; place on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until tender, about 1 hour; cool slightly. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Cut sweet potatoes in half; scrape flesh into a large bowl when cool enough to handle. Discard skins. Beat sweet potatoes with an electric mixer until smooth.

Transfer 6 cups mashed sweet potatoes to a separate large bowl. Add ¾ cup brown sugar, cream, ¼ cup melted butter, ¼ teaspoon cinnamon, and salt; beat to combine. Pour sweet potato mixture into an 8x8-inch baking dish.

Place rolled oats into the bowl of a food processor or blender; pulse until finely ground. Combine oats, 2 tablespoons brown sugar, flour, and ⅛ teaspoon cinnamon in a bowl; cut in 2 tablespoons cold butter with a pastry blender or fork until crumbly. Sprinkle evenly over sweet potato mixture.

Bake in the preheated oven until sweet potatoes are heated through and oatmeal streusel is lightly browned, 70 to 80 minutes. Remove from oven, sprinkle immediately with marshmallows, and let stand until marshmallows are melted, about 10 minutes.

restaurant-style-white-queso-dip.name: Restaurant-style White Queso Dip
instructions: Combine American cheese and half-and-half in a medium microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high power in 1 1/2 minute intervals, stirring in between each interval, until melted and creamy, 5 to 7 minutes.
Stir in jalapeños, jalapeño juice, cumin, and cayenne. Microwave for 30 seconds. Stir and serve immediately.

restorative-beef-broth.name: Restorative Beef Broth
instructions: Combine short ribs, onion, prunes, and garlic in a very large heavy pot; add 6 quarts water (preferably filtered or spring water). If unable to add all water at once, pour in remaining liquid later as broth reduces. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, skimming any foam from the surface. Cover with lid slightly ajar. Reduce heat to low and simmer very gently, occasionally skimming the surface, until meat is tender, about 2 ½ hours. Uncover; simmer until broth is intensely flavored, about 3 hours longer.

Place a fine-mesh sieve over another large pot; line with a layer of cheesecloth and strain broth (you should have about 8 cups). Remove beef from bones in strainer and reserve for another use; discard remaining solids in strainer. Spoon fat from surface of broth. Season to taste with salt. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Rewarm before serving.

retox-tequila-cocktail.name: Retox Tequila Cocktail
instructions: Rim half of a rocks glass with kosher salt. Muddle jalapeño in base of cocktail shaker. Add maple syrup, lemon, and tequila. Shake vigorously with ice.
Fill rimmed glass with fresh ice. Double strain cocktail (to remove any pepper bits) into prepared glass. Garnish with lemon slice.

retro-ground-beef-casserole-with-biscuit.name: Retro Ground Beef Casserole With Biscuits
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly coat a baking dish with cooking spray.
Heat oil in a sauté pan over medium-high heat. Add carrots, onions, and celery; sauté until onions translucent, 5 to 7 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground beef; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain; discard grease.

Move beef to one side of skillet; add butter and melt over medium heat. Whisk in flour, a little at a time until combined. Whisk in beef broth. Add sautéed vegetables, garlic salt, onion powder, garlic powder, and black pepper. Bring to a boil; cover and remove from heat.

Meanwhile, add baking mix to a bowl; stir in buttermilk until a soft dough forms. Transfer dough to a piece of waxed paper; roll to 1/2-inch thickness. Cut out biscuits with a 2 ½-inch round biscuit cutter dipped in baking mix.
Pour beef mixture into prepared baking dish; top with biscuits.
Bake in the preheated oven until biscuits browned, 24 to 25 minutes.

reuben-dutch-baby.name: Reuben Dutch Baby
instructions: Real Talk: The key to getting a big, light, puffy rise is to make sure the flour is thoroughly incorporated into the egg mixture. Whisk your arm off until zero, absolutely zero, clumps remain.

Place a 10" cast-iron skillet in oven; preheat to 425°. Whisk eggs, milk, and 1 tsp. mustard in a medium bowl until smooth. Whisking constantly, gradually add flour, whisking until smooth; season with salt. Stir in half of cheese and ½ tsp. pepper.

Carefully remove preheated skillet from oven and add butter; swirl skillet to coat. Drape half of pastrami into skillet (it’s okay if it bends and folds over itself); season with salt and pepper. Pour egg mixture over. Return skillet to oven and bake until Dutch baby is puffed and golden brown, 12–15 minutes.
Remove skillet from oven and heat broiler (do not fear the broiler). Drape remaining pastrami over Dutch baby; top with remaining 2 oz. cheese. Broil until cheese is melted, about 3 minutes.
Top with sauerkraut and mustard before serving.

reuben-loaf.name: Reuben Loaf
instructions: In a large bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups flour, yeast, sugar and salt. Add warm water, mustard and butter; stir well. Stir in the remaining flour, 1/2 cup at a time, beating well after each addition. When the dough has pulled together, turn it out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, about 6 minutes. Cover and let rest for 10 minutes.

On lightly floured surface, roll dough to a 10x15 rectangle. Layer corned beef, Swiss cheese, and sauerkraut in the center third of the rectangle. Use a knife to make cuts from filling to dough edge, approximately 1 inches apart. Folds strips across bread, alternating sides. Cover loaf and let rise in a warm area for 45 minutes.
Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Brush risen loaf with beaten egg. Bake in preheated oven for 30 minutes, until golden brown.

reuben-nachos.name: Reuben Nachos
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Mix together mayonnaise, ketchup, sour cream, relish, red onion, Dijon mustard, and garlic salt in a small bowl until well blended. Set sauce aside.
Layer 1/2 of the tortilla chips in an even layer on a baking sheet. Top with 1 cup Swiss cheese, 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, and 1/4 teaspoon dill. Repeat layers with remaining chips, cheeses, and dill.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheeses are melted, about 5 minutes. Remove from the oven. Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Top nachos evenly with corned beef and sauerkraut.
Cook under the preheated broiler until heated through, 1 to 2 minutes. Top nachos with sauce to serve.

reuben-nachos-for-two.name: Reuben Nachos For Two
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add corned beef and cook until crisp on all sides, about 5 minutes.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Place drained sauerkraut in a bowl with caraway seed; stir to combine.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven\\u2019s broiler to high.'}

{'step': '4', 'description': 'Place 1/2 of the chips in an oven-proof skillet. Scatter 1/2 of the corned beef and 1/2 of the sauerkraut on top of the chips. Drizzle 1/2 of the Thousand Island dressing over the corned beef and top with 1/2 of the Swiss cheese. Repeat layers once more.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Broil in the preheated oven until cheese has melted, about 5 minutes.'}

reuben-sandwich-the-american-that-you-ha.name: Reuben Sandwich, The American That You Have To Try
reuben-sandwich-the-american-that-you-ha.original_name: Sándwich Reuben, el clásico americano que tienes que probar

ingredients.item: 4-6 rebanadas de carne de pastrami o corned beef
1/4 de taza de chucrut, bien escurrido
2 rebanadas de queso suizo (como emmental o gruyere)
1-2 cucharadas de aderezo ruso o russian dressing
1-2 cucharadas de mantequilla (para untar en el pan)
1 cucharada de pepinillos dulces picados finamente (o relish de pepinillos dulces)
1 / 2 tablespoon hot radish (optional, for a hot touch)

instructions: In a medium bowl, it combines mayonnaise, ketchup, Dijon mustard, sweet pickles, onion (if you are using them), hot radish, and Worcestershire sauce. Test the sauce and adjust the taste with salt and pepper to suit. If you prefer a more sweet taste, you can add some more pickles or ketchup. If you like more hot, add some more hot radish. Let the salsa rest in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before using it so that flavors are well integrated.
Toma dos rebanadas de pan de centeno y unta una capa delgada de mantequilla en uno de los lados de cada rebanada.
He puts a slice of bread with the butter-free part down into a frying pan with medium heat.
Add a slice of Swiss cheese, followed by a generous portion of pastrami or corned beef.
Encima, coloca el chucrut bien escurrido y luego una cucharada de salsa rusa.
Finally, add another slice of Swiss cheese and close the sandwich with the second slice of bread with the part with butter up.

It cooks the sandwich with medium heat, slightly pressurized with a scatula so that all ingredients merge. Cooking for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or till the bread is golden and crispy and the cheese has been melted. Remove the Sandwich from the frying pan, cut them in half and serve them hot. Join with pickle or light salad.

reunion-rum-punch.name: Reunion Rum Punch
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a saucepan; pour into a mug and brew chai tea for 5 minutes. Remove tea bag and mix brown sugar into the hot tea until dissolved. Allow tea to cool for about 10 minutes.
Mix tea, pineapple juice, rum, vermouth, and vanilla-flavored syrup together in a large punch bowl; stir well. Chill for at least 2 hours before serving.

revani-with-cocoa-and-whipped-cream-lezz.name: Revani With Cocoa And Whipped Cream
instructions: 1. Leave water and sugar in the pot and boil in the middle fire.
2. Add lemon juice after boiling for a few minutes.
3. Leave to cool from January.
4. Set oven to 180 degrees.
5. Cook the butter for 6-7 minutes with mixer, taking yogurt, eggs, broths and sugary vanilla into the mixing container.
6. Add flour, dough baking powder and cocoa and mix it with spatula.
7. Transfer the dough into lubricated oven container and cook for 35-40 minutes in the oven.
8. After taking the oven and waiting for 1 minute, visit the cold harvest.
9. Leave to rest for 1 hour.
10. Spray the milk until the cream is joined with schanti and broadcast on the dessert.

reverse-sear-rib-eye-roast-with-fennel-a.name: Reverse Sear Rib-eye Roast With Fennel And Rosemary

ingredients.prep: preferably dry-aged, chine bone removed, fat trimmed to  0.25 inch thick
1 cup cut into pieces,  0.5 cup room temperature

ingredients.item: A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Working in 2 batches, scatter rosemary over a paper towel–lined plate. Top with another sheet of paper towel and microwave on high 1 minute. Check rosemary and continue to microwave in 20-second intervals, until dry and crisp. Grind rosemary in spice mill or with mortar and pestle to a powder. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in fennel pollen.

Place roast, fat side down, on a cutting board with a long side facing you. Using a sharp slicing knife and long strokes, cut roast into two 3-bone roasts. French rib bones 1½" from tip of bones, if desired. Score fat cap in a crosshatch pattern, spacing cuts 1" apart. Rub roasts all over with garlic, then coat with rosemary mixture. Season generously with salt and pepper. Place, fat cap up, on a rack, set inside a roasting pan. Chill, uncovered, at least 8 hours and up to 1 day.
Let roasts sit at room temperature 2 hours for even roasting.

Place a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 225°. Roast meat, rotating pan once, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of roasts registers 125° for medium-rare, or 130° for medium, 3 ½–4 hours. Remove from oven, tent with foil, and let rest 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, cook bacon in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to a small bowl; reserve for another use (it’s the fat you’re after). Add butter pieces to drippings in pan and cook, stirring often, until mixture foams, then browns, 5–8 minutes. Strain into a medium nonreactive bowl. Immediately stir in shallot; let cool (butter will have set up but will still be soft). Using an electric mixer on medium-high, add room-temperature butter to bacon fat mixture and beat until light and fluffy. Mix in chives and vinegar; season bacon butter with salt. Chill, stirring occasionally, at least 20 minutes (butter should be a little more firm but still light and fluffy).
Move rack to upper third of oven; increase oven temperature to 500°. Roast meat until deep brown and exterior is crisp, 8–10 minutes. Serve rib-eye roast with bacon butter.
Do Ahead: Bacon butter mixture (without chives and vinegar) can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled. Let soften slightly before adding chives and vinegar.

reverse-sear-method-for-thick-steaks.name: Reverse-sear Method For Thick Steaks
instructions: Position racks in the middle and lower third of the oven. Place a cast-iron skillet on the bottom rack. Preheat the oven to 107°C (110 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and place a wire rack on top.
Pat steaks dry with a paper towel; season generously on all sides with salt and black pepper. Place on the wire rack on the baking sheet.

Bake in the preheated oven on the middle rack until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center reads 49°C (49 degrees C) for medium-rare. Begin checking the temperature at 40 minutes; continue baking and checking temperature every 10 minutes. Remove steaks from oven; set aside.

Carefully remove hot cast-iron skillet from the oven using an oven mitt. Set it on the stovetop over medium-high heat. Add oil; heat until barely starts smoking. Carefully add steaks, releasing them away from you so oil doesn't splatter in your direction. Cook until a golden crust forms, 2 minutes per side, flipping only once. Stand steaks on their sides to render any fat using tongs.
Reduce heat to low; add butter, garlic, and rosemary to skillet. Baste steaks with butter mixture using a spoon, about 3 minutes. Transfer steaks to a cutting board; rest about 10 minutes.
Serve steaks whole or sliced; sprinkle with sea salt flakes.

reverse-sear-prime-rib-roast.name: Reverse-sear Prime Rib Roast
instructions: Season roast generously with salt.
Cover loosely with plastic wrap and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Let roast come to room temperature.
Preheat the oven to 93°C (95 degrees C).
Mix butter, rosemary, thyme, and black pepper together in a small bowl.
Spread butter mixture over roast. Place roast in a large roasting pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until internal temperature reaches 46°C (46 degrees C) for medium-rare, about 3 ½ hours. Remove from the oven and tent with aluminum foil; let rest, about 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, increase the oven temperature to 260°C (260 degrees C).
Roast until well-browned, 6 to 10 minutes. Slice and serve.

reverse-sear-steak.name: Reverse-sear Steak
instructions: Preheat the oven to 93°C(95°C).
Pat the steak dry with a paper towel, then generously season on all sides with salt and pepper.

Place the steak on a wire rack set on top of a baking sheet and bake for 45-60 minutes, until the internal temperature reaches about 52°C/50˚C for medium-rare. Adjust the bake time if you like your steak more rare or well-done.

Heat the canola oil in a pan over high heat until smoking. Do not use olive oil, as its smoke point is significantly lower than that of canola oil and it will smoke before reaching the desired cooking temperature.
Sear the steak for 1 minute on one side, then flip.
Add the butter, garlic, rosemary, and thyme and swirl around the pan. Transfer the garlic and herbs on top of the steak and baste the steak with the butter using a large spoon.
Baste for about 1 minute, then flip the steak with tongs and baste the other side for about 15 seconds.
Turn the steak on its side to render off any excess fat.
Enjoy!

revythada-sifnos-argiro.name: Revythada Sifnos

ingredients.item: Flour and water for sealing the vessel
Flour and water for sealing the vessel

instructions: From the night before, we soak the chickpeas in room temperature water.
Leave them all night long in plenty of water to swell. In the morning we rinse them well and put them in the clay vessel for the chickythada.

Add all the ingredients, chopped onions, olive oil, salt, pepper, bay leaves and water. The water we add must be necessary at room temperature and tilting the clay pot side to the edge of its lip and covering the chickpeas.
Cover the vessel with its lid and place it in the wood oven.
Allow the chickpea to simmer for many hours. Depending on the temperature of the oven, leave it for 6-10 hours in the wood oven.

revythoryzo-of-argyros-argiro.name: Revythoryzo Of Argyros
instructions: In a shallow pot, heat the olive oil and place the onion in medium heat for a few minutes.
Add the already cooked chickpeas and water.
Once the food is boiled, add the brown rice and lower the heat.
Simmer for 10′ until the rice softens.
Add salt and pepper to the end of cooking.
After removing the food, cover the pot with a clean towel.
Let it stand for 5-10′′ and draw its liquids.

rhodes-bun-with-chicken-argiro.name: Rhodes Bun With Chicken
instructions: For the crockery of Rhodes with chicken, boil the chicken with vegetables whole until it softens. We hold the broth and we debon the chicken.
In a wide pot and medium heat, heat the butter to melt. Add the onion and stir. Add Koulouria.
Mix the pasta for 2-3′. Slowly and gradually with a spoon add the chicken broth by mixing the ingredients.
Cucuria begins to grow and a liquid cream is created in the pot. Add the chopped chicken. Salt and pepper.

Finally, to serve Koulouria, heat the butter in a pan to melt. Add the kefalotyri and set aside for 1-2 ́ to melt the cheese. We throw the spruce into the bagels. Mix and serve immediately in deep dishes.
This unique traditional recipe of the Aegean was shared with us by Chef Euripidis Gogos, a member of the Club of Chief Cooks of Dodecanese and Cyclades and we thank him very much.
Rhodes Koulouria you will find in many variations. Sometimes simpler and sometimes more composer.
This traditional Rhodesian recipe of marriage is very rich in taste and very delicious. The process of scraping it makes it unrepeatable.
You can instead use chicken or goat.
Traditionally it is done with goat and is served in all weddings in Rhodes. See the traditional version here.
Koulouria is a traditional pasta from Archangel Rhodes. It is made with whole flour and is pasta without eggs.
See all the recipes shown on the show "The Mothers of the Aegean" here.

rhubarb-and-dried-fig-jam.name: Rhubarb And Dried Fig Jam
instructions: Inspect 8 half-pint jars for cracks and rings for rust, discard any defective ones. Immerse in simmering water until rhubarb jam is ready. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.
Combine figs, port wine, and orange zest in a bowl. Soak for 2 to 3 hours.

Combine soaked figs, soaking liquid, and rhubarb in a saucepan over medium heat and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until rhubarb is tender and starts to fall apart, about 3 minutes.

Stir in pectin and bring mixture to a full rolling boil over high heat. Add sugar and stir to dissolve. Return to a full rolling boil and boil for exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Skim off any foam with a ladle or a large spoon.

Pack rhubarb-fig jam into the prepared jars, filling to within 1/4 inch of the top. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around the insides of the jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any spills. Top with lids and tightly screw on rings.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 10 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and place onto a cloth-covered or wood surface, several inches apart. Let rest for 24 hours without moving the jars. Gently press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down. Remove the rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area.

rhubarb-and-ginger-brioche-bread-pudding.name: Rhubarb And Ginger Brioche Bread Pudding

ingredients.prep: ends trimmed, stalks cut into  0.5 inch-wide pieces (8 to 9 cups)

ingredients.item: 1/2-inch-thick slices brioche or egg bread (each about 5x4 inches)

instructions: Whisk preserves and 1/2 cup water in heavy large skillet over medium heat until preserves dissolve. Sprinkle ginger and orange peel over. Scatter rhubarb evenly in skillet. Bring mixture to simmer over medium heat, occasionally stirring very gently, until rhubarb is slightly tender but still intact, about 10 minutes. Pour mixture into large sieve set over large saucepan. Let drain 15 minutes. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover fruit and syrup separately and chill.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Whisk sugar and eggs in medium bowl. Place milk and cream in heavy medium saucepan. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean. Bring to simmer over medium heat. Gradually add hot cream mixture to egg mixture, whisking custard to blend.

Butter 13x9x2-inch oval baking dish. Arrange enough bread slices in dish to cover bottom (some spaces will remain between slices). Spoon half of rhubarb evenly over. Repeat with bread and rhubarb. Pour custard over. Place baking dish in roasting pan. Add enough hot water to pan to come halfway up sides of dish.
Bake pudding until just set in center, about 50 minutes. Remove from oven. Let stand in water bath 30 minutes; remove. Boil reserved syrup until reduced to 1 cup, about 10 minutes. Keep warm.
Brush top of pudding with some rhubarb syrup. Spoon warm pudding into bowls; top with syrup and whipped cream.

rhubarb-and-raspberry-crostata.name: Rhubarb And Raspberry Crostata

ingredients.item: Sweetened whipped cream or vanilla ice cream

instructions:
Combine both flours, sugar, and salt in a processor; blend for 5 seconds. Add butter; pulse until butter is reduced to pea-size pieces. Whisk egg and milk in a small bowl to blend; add to processor and pulse until moist clumps form. Gather dough into a ball; flatten into a disk. Wrap in plastic wrap; chill at least 1½ hours.
Do Ahead: Crust can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Dissolve cornstarch in 3 Tbsp. water in a small bowl; set aside. Combine rhubarb, raspberries, and sugar in a large heavy saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring often, until sugar dissolves and juices are released, about 4 minutes.
